title: Too Many Recipes
description: Recipes that shouldn't be in Minecraft.
body:
This datapack is for 1.20 and above, it adds about 21 recipes to Minecraft.

Some make sense, and others, well, make sense if you think about it.

All recipes will be shown in crafting tables.

----
The datapack adds recipes for:
- Elytra
- Totem of Undying
- God Apple(of course)
- Eggs(dragon, turtle, sniffer)
- Stone Sword
- Glow/Redstone Dust
- Echo/Amethyst Shard
- Logs
- Bedrock
- Obsidian
- Leather(Furnacing rotten flesh instead of crafting table)
